title: phlegmariurus subulatus
intro: Phlegmariurus subulatus, also known as the club moss or spike moss, is a type of evergreen, flowering plant that belongs to the lycopod family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Phlegmariurus subulatus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and help in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Phlegmariurus subulatus can be prepared as an herbal remedy by drying and processing its leaves, stems, and roots, which can then be used in teas, infusions, or as capsules.
